title: SessionTokenClaims
description: JWT claims for the broker token minted by the backend (POST /workspaces/:id/sessions) and validated by the workspace daemon. Algorithm: EdDSA (Ed25519). Signing key lives in backend Fly secret; verifier public key is baked into the workspace VM image.

iss.description: Issuer — always the Rommel control plane.

sub.description: Subject — opaque user id (matches users.id in Postgres).

wid.description: Workspace id this token authorises. Daemon rejects tokens whose 'wid' doesn't match its own workspace.

scope.description: Capability scopes. Daemon enforces per-primitive — e.g. 'fs:rw' grants fs.read + fs.write; 'fs:r' grants read-only. Answers primitives.md cross-cutting Q5.

exp.description: Expiry, unix seconds. Tokens are short-lived (~5 min) — refresh via POST /sessions/:id/refresh.

jti.description: JWT id (UUIDv4). Reserved for future replay-protection / revocation list.
